name: Work Item Associated View
fetchxml:
<fetch version="1.0" mapping="logical">
        <entity name="cdxmeta_workitem">
          <attribute name="cdxmeta_workitemid" />
          <attribute name="cdxmeta_workitemname" />
          <attribute name="createdon" />
          <order attribute="cdxmeta_workitemname" descending="false" />
          <filter type="and">
            <condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" />
          </filter>
        </entity>
      </fetch>
layoutxml:
<grid name="cdxmeta_workitems" jump="cdxmeta_workitemname" select="1" icon="1" preview="1">
        <row name="cdxmeta_workitem" id="cdxmeta_workitemid">
          <cell name="cdxmeta_workitemname" width="300" />
          <cell name="createdon" width="125" />
        </row>
      </grid>
